_comment: Reproduces the Verified Monitoring (N1) dashboard demo on synthetic opp 10008. The dashboard render (commcare_connect/workflow/templates/verified_monitoring_render.js) reads this curated state from the workflow run's instance.state and never fetches. 'show-don't-tell': the render presents these results neutrally with no causal claims. regenerate.py builds the full state payload (including the two-ward map overlay GeoJSON, sampled deterministically) and creates a workflow run via the connect_labs MCP.
_coverage_comment: Six bi-monthly survey rounds per ward. Each round's verified coverage jitters within a normal survey band; the latest round (R6) equals the hero numbers. coverage_pct paired with (n surveyed, confirmed) per round.
_overlay_comment: Two adjacent wards in Kaduna State, Nigeria — Kaura (treatment) left, Gedawa (control) right, sharing the lon=8.30 edge. service_delivery_sample points are drawn only inside Kaura (a legible sample of the 2,300 logged visits; the count label stays 2,300). survey_pins are drawn in BOTH wards (independent survey covered both) — purple = vitamin-A confirmed, pink = absent.
